title: Returning Data from Screens
description: Getting results back from a pushed route.

slides.title: Returning Results ↩️
slides.content:
# Getting Data Back

When you pop a route, you can return a value to the previous screen.

* `Navigator.pop(context, result)` – sends result back.
* `push` methods return a `Future` that completes with the result when the route is popped.

quizData.question: What type does Navigator.push return?
quizData.explanation: push returns a Future that resolves to the value passed to pop.

slides.title: Awaiting a Result
slides.content: Select an item from a list and return it:

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Handle null results

The result may be null if the user cancels (e.g., back button). Always handle null cases.
